title: Design By Violet Christmas Jumper Medium Gift Bag – Bright Printed Design with Festive Sweater Motif and Ribbon Handle – Great for Books, Toys & Small Gifts
features: MEDIUM GIFT BAG – Practical size measuring 25 cm x 21.5 cm x 10 cm – ideal for books, accessories, small toys or sweet treats
BRIGHT FESTIVE DESIGN – Colourful print featuring a large festive jumper with “Merry Xmas” text and repeating jumper motifs on the sides
STURDY CONSTRUCTION – Made from durable card with reinforced sides and base to keep presents secure and well-presented
RIBBON HANDLE & TAG – Green ribbon handle for comfortable carrying and matching gift tag ready for your message
FAST & EASY WRAP – Quick, reusable alternative to wrapping paper, saving time during the Christmas rush
description: Add a touch of festive fun to your gift-giving with this Design By Violet Christmas Jumper gift bag. Featuring a bold printed design of a colourful festive jumper with “Merry Xmas” wording and patterned sleeves, this bag is the perfect way to wrap your seasonal surprises. The side panels are decorated with repeating jumper motifs, adding extra charm. Crafted from durable card with a reinforced base and sides, it is strong enough to hold toys, clothes, books, or multiple smaller gifts. The green ribbon handle makes it easy to carry, and the coordinating gift tag is ready for a handwritten message so you can personalise your gift. Reusable and quick to use, this bag is a cheerful alternative to traditional wrapping paper. Just pop in your present, add your message and you’re done – ideal for creating a bright and festive presentation with minimal effort.
